issue: User cannot log in, password expired or forgotten
resolution:
1. Go to https://sso.company.com/reset
2. Enter company email
3. Check phone for SMS code
4. Set new password (8+ chars, uppercase, number, symbol)
5. Contact IT if locked after 3 attempts

1. Ensure GlobalProtect v6+ installed
2. Disconnect/reconnect VPN
3. Switch gateway: Settings > Gateway > nearest region
4. Flush DNS: ipconfig /flushdns
5. Restart GlobalProtect service

1. Raise request at https://itportal.company.com/software
2. Manager approval required for paid licenses
3. Wait for email with install link
4. Standard apps via Software Center
5. Allow 1 business day

issue: Outlook not syncing, emails delayed or not sending
resolution:
1. Check Office 365 status
2. Outlook: File > Account Settings > Repair
3. Clear cache: delete %localappdata%\Microsoft\Outlook\*.ost
4. Restart Outlook, allow sync time
5. Try OWA incognito mode

issue: Printer not found, offline, or print job stuck
resolution:
1. Check printer power/network
2. Cancel jobs: Settings > Printers > right-click > Cancel all
3. Restart Print Spooler service
4. Re-add printer by IP
5. Floor printers: IP range 10.0.5.x

issue: No internet access or network drive not accessible
resolution:
1. Check cable/Wi-Fi
2. Run Network Troubleshooter
3. ipconfig /release && /renew
4. Map drive: \\fileserver\share
5. New devices need IT provisioning

issue: Laptop slow, freezing, or hardware malfunction
resolution:
1. Full restart
2. Ensure 15%+ free disk space
3. Run Windows Update
4. Check Task Manager for resource hogs
5. Hardware failures: submit request with asset tag

issue: Cannot access system, application, or shared folder
resolution:
1. Verify role requires access
2. Request via https://itportal.company.com/access
3. Manager approval required
4. Standard: 1 business day
5. Urgent: mark URGENT, escalate to IT BP

issue: Suspicious email, phishing, or security incident
resolution:
1. DO NOT click links/attachments
2. Forward as attachment to security@company.com
3. If clicked: disconnect + call ext. 5555
4. Compromised creds: reset at sso.company.com/reset
5. Security responds within 1 hour
